typecheck.note: Fixed two clippy errors: derive Default for AutonomyLevel, allow needless_range_loop in backlog.rs

lint.note: Warnings present but non-blocking (unused imports, unused variables)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document how skillName in features.json maps to actual skill files in .factory/skills/. Currently skillName='Rust' but actual skill is at .factory/skills/worker/SKILL.md (Rust Worker Skill). This inconsistency causes confusion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: autonomy-levels and work-backlog features both use skillName 'Rust' but .factory/skills/ directory only contains 'worker/' subdirectory. No .factory/skills/Rust/ exists.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether the mission-worker-base skill referenced in transcripts actually exists or if it was renamed/moved.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Transcript shows Skill { skill: 'mission-worker-base' } invocation but skill doesn't exist at .factory/skills/worker/. The worker/SKILL.md is titled 'Rust Worker Skill'.

rejectedObservations.observation: work-backlog: Decay function raises approval threshold as run progresses - semantic direction may be counterintuitive
rejectedObservations.reason: This is the documented and intended behavior. The comment in backlog.rs line 13 documents this clearly. Workers are expected to read code documentation.

rejectedObservations.observation: work-backlog: Unused PriorityScoringConfig fields (spec_alignment_weight, blocking_impact_weight, complexity_weight)
rejectedObservations.reason: Placeholder fields for future functionality. Not a bug - the scoring is correctly implemented with current fields.
The field is defined for configuration purposes but the threshold is hardcoded as per current design. Not a bug.
The underscore prefix indicates intentional unused parameter for future use. Not a bug.

rejectedObservations.observation: autonomy-levels: Unnecessary Clone derive on ApprovalRequest
rejectedObservations.reason: Minor API cleanliness issue. Not a bug and fixing it provides minimal value.

rejectedObservations.observation: autonomy-levels: No timeout for pending approval requests
rejectedObservations.reason: Would be a future enhancement. Current behavior is acceptable for MVP.
